titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 38: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 38. VEṆMANDAI, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock in the tank of the village.

Records that Kaśuvaraṉ Tiruppaḻaṉaśeydāṉ, the Kiḻavaṉ (head man) and the leading citizen (talaimagaṉ) of Karuvūr who was given the charge of the headmanship of Karuvūr in Veṅgala-nāḍu took over the ērippaṭṭi (land granted for the maintenance of the reservoir) at Veṇpaḻandai in Vādavūr-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Veṇkuṉṟakōṭṭam after it had been measured and had the sluice for the lake constructed and set apart the rest of the land as ērippaṭṭi.
Published in Āvaṇam., Issue No. 7 July 1996 p. 161.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
matiraikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟki yāṇṭu muppattu muṉṟāvatu
veṇkuṉṟakoṭṭattu vātavūrnāṭṭu veṇpaḻantai Erikku Erippaṭ
ṭi nilamaḷantu vanta nilam cuṭṭi Iṭṭukoṇṭu Ittūmpum Erip
paṭṭiyum(ñ) ceytāṉ veṅkālanāṭṭu karuvūr talaimakaṉ karuvūr kiḻamai pe
ṟṟa karuvūr kiḻavaṉ kacuvaraṉ tiruppaḻaṉaceytāṉ Ivai rakṣittāṉ pāta tū
ḷi Eṉṟalai melaṉaThere are four more letters which may be read ṉaṟātā
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
